## Testing

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] Manual pi test, if UI/command behavior changed

## Checklist

- [ ] I updated README/CHANGELOG for user-visible changes.
- [ ] I kept the primary UX simple (`/fusion-setup`, `/fusion`, `/fusion <prompt>`, `/fusion-status`).
- [ ] I did not add runtime dependencies unless necessary.
- [ ] I considered privacy/context implications for panel and judge calls.
